title: Looking to expand my team
author: No_Page5992
selftext:
Hey everyone,

I have been busy for some time re-creating my own strategy into automation.  
I do this together with an programmer, who is mainly specialized on Ctrader.

This project is running pretty well so far, and is nearing the finish line i suspect.  
Because if this, i would like to expand my team with devs, and possible moderators.

The objective for the expansion would be to re-create analysis components, for example to use on Tradingview.  
Or even re-create the whole bot to function on MT4/5.

To elaborate:  
If there is 1 thing i have learned during my life so far, is you'll get way further together, instead standing alone.  
My idea is to work together with the same vision.  
Whenever problems occur, we have each other who could jump in.  
When we have doubts, we would have each other to confirm, or deny.

If this sounds something you'd be up for, don't hesitate to reach out :)
